mapper.insert: insert into BSC_BONDESTIMATE (L_DATA_TYPE, VC_SCODE, VC_BOND_CODE, L_MARKET, L_ESTIMATE_DATE, EN_NPRICE, EN_FPRICE, EN_INTEREST, EN_YEARS, EN_YIELD, EN_DURATION, EN_MDURATION, EN_CONVEXITY, EN_DIFFDURATION, EN_DIFFCONVEXITY, EN_BASISPOINTVAL, EN_RATIODURATION, EN_RATIOCONVEXITY, EN_RESIDUAL_CAPITAL, EN_SPREAD, D_UPDATETIME, ETL_TIME) values (#{lDataType,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcScode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcBondCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lMarket,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lEstimateDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enNprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enFprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enInterest,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enYears,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enYield,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enDuration,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enMduration,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enConvexity,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enDiffduration,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enDiffconvexity,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enBasispointval,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enRatioduration,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enRatioconvexity,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enResidualCapital,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enSpread,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dUpdatetime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{etlTime,jdbcType=DATE})
mapper.select: select L_DATA_TYPE, VC_SCODE, VC_BOND_CODE, L_MARKET, L_ESTIMATE_DATE, EN_NPRICE, EN_FPRICE, EN_INTEREST, EN_YEARS, EN_YIELD, EN_DURATION, EN_MDURATION, EN_CONVEXITY, EN_DIFFDURATION, EN_DIFFCONVEXITY, EN_BASISPOINTVAL, EN_RATIODURATION, EN_RATIOCONVEXITY, EN_RESIDUAL_CAPITAL, EN_SPREAD, D_UPDATETIME, ETL_TIME from BSC_BONDESTIMATE
